name: Financial Street Property Co., Limited
summary: Financial Street Property Co., Limited operates as a property management company in the People's Republic of China. It manages various types of business properties, such as office and commercial buildings, business complexes, low-density office parks, public properties, hospitals, college properties, and residences. The company also provides community pension, real estate brokerage, and catering services, as well as operates hotels. Its customers include national financial regulatory agencies, financial bank headquarters, and large state-owned enterprises and businesses. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. Financial Street Property Co., Limited is a subsidiary of Beijing Huarong Zonghe Investment Co., Ltd.
